name: Sufentanil
executiveSummary: Highly potent opioid for balanced anesthesia and ICU sedation.
indications:
## Indications

- Analgesia in major anesthesia.
- Sedoanalgesia in the ICU in regimens with midazolam/propofol.

## Precautions

- High potency: critical dosing errors.
- Respiratory depression.

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

pediatrico.dose: 0.5–1 mcg/kg bolus; infusion according to protocol.

neonatal.dose: Microdoses in NICU according to analgesia protocol.

stability:
## Stability

- Prepare in pump with double check.
adverseEffects:
## Adverse effects

- Apnea, chest wall rigidity, bradycardia.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
